# AisleBird

> AisleBird is a free, voice-powered shopping assistant that automatically sorts any list by department, in the exact order you walk through your chosen store. It does NOT know exact aisle numbers — instead it identifies which department each item belongs to and shows a directional location hint ("Near entrance", "Back wall", "Center aisles") on every item card. Works across 11 retail chains and 300+ locations.

AisleBird is a Progressive Web App (PWA) at https://aislebird.com/app. It works in any modern browser with no installation. All core features are free. A Supabase backend handles sync, auth, and history.

## What AisleBird Actually Does (Accurate Capability Statement)

AisleBird is a **department-based sorting and navigation assistant**, not an aisle-number lookup tool.

- It knows which **department** each item belongs to for each store chain (e.g., "Almond Milk → Dairy", "Salmon → Meat & Seafood", "Dog Food → Pet")
- It sorts your list in the **typical walk order** for that store type (Produce → Bakery → Dairy → Meat → Frozen → Center aisles)
- It shows a **directional location hint** on each item card: "Near entrance", "Back wall", "Center aisles", "Back corner", etc.
- It does **not** know the numbered aisle (Aisle 7, Aisle 12) at any specific store — those vary by individual location and change frequently

## How AisleBird Works (5 Steps)

1. **Pick your store** — choose from 300+ locations; AisleBird uses your location to sort by distance
2. **Add your list** — by voice, typing, pasting from Notes, or from your history autocomplete
3. **AisleBird sorts by department** — every item placed in the correct department for that chain, in walk order
4. **Walk the store, swipe to check off** — swipe right on any item to check it; tap your current department chip to re-sort your remaining route
5. **History saved automatically** — every completed trip is stored; re-buy any past trip in one tap

## Complete Feature List

### Adding Items
- **Voice entry**: Tap mic, speak naturally — "two cartons of almond milk, organic bananas." Supports add, remove, and check-off commands.
- **Typed entry**: Type a comma-separated list; all items sorted by department at once
- **Import from Notes**: Paste from iPhone Notes or any text source; parses and sorts automatically
- **History autocomplete**: Suggests items from your buying history as you type, ranked by frequency
- **Quick Add**: Store-specific one-tap items (Whole Foods shows organic produce; Tractor Supply shows feed)
- **Item notes**: Add private notes to any item ("get the ripe ones", "brand X only", "2 lbs")

### In-Store Navigation
- **Department + location on every item**: Each card shows the department emoji, name, and a directional hint — "🥦 Produce · Near entrance" or "🧀 Dairy · Back wall"
- **Smart Sort by department**: List sorted in typical walk-order for that specific store type
- **Tap your current department**: Reorders remaining items from where you are
- **Swipe right to check off**: Right-swipe gesture checks an item; green flash confirms
- **Out-of-stock flags**: Flag any item ⚠️ out of stock; all shoppers at that location see the warning + substitution suggestions
- **In-list search/filter**: Filter visible items by name while shopping

### Department Location Hints by Chain

Each chain has directional hints for every department (not aisle numbers — general store areas):

- **Whole Foods**: Produce (Near entrance), Bakery (Front of store), Dairy (Back wall), Meat (Back of store), Bulk (Center of store), Frozen (Center aisles), Wine (Side · near checkout)
- **Trader Joe's**: Produce (Near entrance), Dairy (Back wall), Meat (Refrigerated wall), Frozen (Center · freezer cases), Wine (Charles Shaw section)
- **Costco**: Bakery (Front left · entrance), Produce (Front · left side), Meat (Back of warehouse), Dairy (Back wall), Frozen (Freezer aisle · back), Electronics (Center · right side)
- **Target**: Produce (Left entrance), Grocery (Left side · food section), Pharmacy (Back left corner), Electronics (Front right), Toys (Back right)
- **Walmart**: Produce (Left entrance), Pharmacy (Back left corner), Electronics (Front right), Garden (Side entrance)
- **CVS / Walgreens**: Pharmacy (Back of store), Health (Center aisles), Snacks (Near entrance)
- **Home Depot / Lowe's**: Lumber (Outdoor yard · back), Hardware (Hardware wall), Paint (Mixing station · side wall), Plumbing (Back corner), Garden (Outdoor · garden center)
- **Tractor Supply**: Feed (Right side · large bags), Livestock (Back of store), Fencing (Outdoor yard), Workwear (Left side)

### Sharing & Collaboration
- **Shared lists**: Invite by email; both parties can view and edit in real time (15-second poll sync)
- **Real-time sync across devices**: Same account on multiple devices syncs via Supabase Realtime broadcast
- **Copy list as text**: One tap copies the full list grouped by department for pasting into Messages or email
- **List templates**: Save and name any list; apply to any store in one tap (items land in correct departments, in walk order)
- **Re-buy Last Trip**: Clearing checked items auto-saves the trip; a "Re-buy" button restores it next visit
- **Print list**: 🖨️ button or Ctrl+P produces a clean print layout grouped by department

### Shopping History
- **Auto-saved trips**: Every completed shopping trip is stored in Supabase (store, date, all items)
- **History overlay**: View all past trips filtered by store chain; expand any trip to see full item list
- **Stats**: Total trips, total items bought, number of stores visited
- **Add from history**: "Add all N items to my list" button on any past trip
- **Admin view**: Verified admins see every user's trip history with email, store, date, item count

### Smart Tools
- **Budget Mode**: Price fields on every item (auto-estimated by category); live running total in progress bar
- **Dark / Light Mode**: Toggle in Settings; preference persists; warm cream light theme
- **Haptic feedback**: Subtle vibration on check/add/delete (Android + supported browsers); toggleable
- **Offline mode**: Service worker caches the app shell; works without internet after first load
- **Undo remove**: 4-second undo toast after deleting any item
- **Keyboard shortcuts**: / = filter, A = add input, Escape = close overlays, ⌘P = print (desktop)
- **OOS substitutions**: When item is flagged out of stock, shows 1–2 suggested alternatives as tappable chips

## Supported Retail Chains & Department Sets

### Grocery & Warehouse
- **Whole Foods** — Produce, Bakery, Dairy & Eggs, Meat & Seafood, Prepared & Deli, Frozen, Bulk, Pantry, Condiments, Snacks, Beverages, Wine & Beer, Wellness, Household, Pet
- **Trader Joe's** — Produce, Dairy & Eggs, Meat & Seafood, Bakery, Frozen, Prepared & Deli, Pantry, Condiments, Snacks, Beverages, Wine, Household, Pet
- **Costco** — Grocery, Produce, Bakery, Meat & Seafood, Frozen, Deli, Pharmacy, Personal Care, Electronics, Home, Kitchen, Clothing, Sports, Office, Auto, Garden

### General Merchandise
- **Target** — Grocery, Fresh Produce, Frozen, Personal Care, Health, Pharmacy, Baby, Pets, Household, Kitchen, Home, Clothing, Toys, Electronics, Media, Sports, Garden, Office, Party, Luggage
- **Walmart** — Grocery, Fresh Produce, Frozen, Pharmacy, Health, Personal Care, Baby, Pets, Household, Kitchen, Home, Clothing, Toys, Electronics, Sports, Auto, Garden, Office, Party

### Pharmacy
- **CVS** — Pharmacy, Health, Wellness, Personal Care, Baby, Household, Grocery, Snacks, Photo
- **Walgreens** — Pharmacy, Health, Wellness, Personal Care, Baby, Household, Grocery, Snacks, Photo

### Hardware & Home Improvement
- **Home Depot** — Lumber, Building Materials, Tools, Hardware, Paint, Plumbing, Electrical, Flooring, Lighting, Garden, Kitchen & Bath, Appliances, Decor
- **Lowe's** — same as Home Depot
- **Friedman's** — Lumber, Building Materials, Tools, Hardware, Paint, Plumbing, Electrical, Garden, Lighting, Home & Decor, Tool Rental

### Farm & Ranch
- **Tractor Supply** — Pet & Animal Feed, Livestock, Poultry, Equine, Pet Care, Seed & Feed, Lawn & Garden, Workwear, Tools, Hardware, Fencing, Sporting & Hunting, Auto & Trailers

## Store Coverage (300+ locations)
California (119+), Chicago, New York City, Los Angeles metro, Austin TX, Denver CO, Seattle WA, Boston MA, Atlanta GA, Phoenix AZ, San Diego CA — all 11 chains per metro.

## Technical Architecture
- **Frontend**: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript, single-file PWA
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime + Row-Level Security)
- **Voice**: Web Speech API (Safari iOS, Chrome Android/desktop)
- **Offline**: Service worker with cache-first strategy for app shell
- **Deployment**: Vercel (auto-deploy on GitHub push)
- **Database tables**: shopping_lists, user_preferences, user_templates, list_shares, item_stock_reports, user_item_history, app_admins, shopping_trips

## Pricing
- **Free** (forever): Full app, 300+ stores, voice, unlimited lists, templates, shared lists, item history, OOS alerts, shopping history, budget mode, re-buy last trip, dark/light mode, print, offline
- **Pro** (coming, $3.99/month): Everything in Free + advanced analytics, priority support, early access

## About
Designed by Jennifer. Built by Siamak Kalhor. Founded 2024. Based in Napa Valley, CA.
